signOutModal.title: Sign out?
signOutModal.body: Are you sure you want to sign out of your account?

changesRequested.title: Profile changes requested
changesRequested.footer: Please update your profile and save — this will resubmit it for review.

noAvailability.title: Add your availability so parents can book you
noAvailability.body: Your profile is live but you have no availability set for the next 14 days — parents won't be able to book a session until you do.

unpublished.title: Your profile is currently hidden from search
unpublished.body: Your account is approved but has been temporarily removed from parent search results by the Sage Nest team. Please contact support if you have questions.

upcomingAppointments.title: Upcoming Appointments
upcomingAppointments.subtitle: Your next scheduled sessions with parents.
upcomingAppointments.cancelError: Failed to cancel the appointment. Please try again.

empty.title: No upcoming appointments.
empty.subtitle: Your availability is live and parents can book you.

cancelModal.title: Cancel this appointment?
cancelModal.warningBody: The parent will receive a full refund and an email notifying them of the cancellation.

noteEditor.label: Private notes
noteEditor.error: Could not save — please try again

card.linkReminder: Session link not yet sent to parent

stripeSuccess.title: Stripe account connected!
stripeSuccess.body: You can now receive payouts when bookings are completed.

pendingDraft.title: Profile changes pending review
pendingDraft.body: Your recent edits have been submitted and are awaiting admin approval. Your live profile is unchanged until they are approved. You can save new changes at any time to update the pending submission.

rejectedDraft.title: Profile changes not approved
rejectedDraft.body: Please update your profile and save again to resubmit for review.

photo.hint: Click your photo to change it · JPEG, PNG or WebP · max 5 MB ·
photo.typeError: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
photo.sizeError: Your photo is {{size}} MB — max 5 MB. Try to upload a photo of shorter size.

details.title: Profile Details
details.positionHint: Displayed below your name on your public profile.
details.summaryPlaceholder: A 1–2 sentence description shown at the top of your public profile…
details.bioPlaceholder: Tell parents about your background, experience and approach…
details.addressHint: Shown to parents on your public profile page.
details.timezoneHint: Used to display your availability slots correctly.
details.languagePlaceholder: Add a language not in the list…
details.languageHint: Custom languages are reviewed by an admin before appearing publicly.
details.socialHint: All fields are optional. Links will appear on your public profile.

validation.bioTooLong: Full bio must be {{max}} characters or fewer.
validation.summaryTooLong: Summary must be {{max}} characters or fewer.

savedAsDraft.title: Changes submitted for review.
savedAsDraft.body: Your live profile is unchanged. An admin will review your edits before they go public.

saveSuccess.title: Profile saved successfully.
saveSuccess.body: Your changes are live. You can come back and edit your profile at any time.

gdpr.title: Your Data
gdpr.body: Download a copy of all personal and professional data Sage Nest holds about you — including your profile, services, bookings, and business information. Provided under GDPR Article 20 (right to data portability).

quals.title: Qualifications
quals.subtitle: At least one qualification with a supporting document must be added before your profile can be submitted for review.
quals.docHint: PDF, JPG, PNG · max 5 MB per document
quals.docUploadHint: Adding a supporting document helps admins verify this entry faster.

form.replaceDocHint: (leave empty to keep existing · PDF, JPG, PNG · max 5 MB)

errors.docSize: Document must be 5 MB or smaller.
errors.docRequired: Please upload a supporting document for this qualification.

certs.title: Certifications
certs.subtitle: Additional training or certifications that build parent trust.
certs.docHint: Supporting documents optional · PDF, JPG, PNG · max 5 MB
certs.docUploadHint: Adding a supporting document helps admins verify this entry faster.

form.replaceDocHint: (leave empty to keep existing · PDF, JPG, PNG · max 5 MB)

errors.docSize: Document must be 5 MB or smaller.

insurance.title: Professional Insurance
insurance.subtitle: Required before your profile can be approved. Upload proof of Public Liability or Professional Indemnity Insurance.
insurance.expiredWarning: Your insurance has expired. Please upload a valid policy before your profile can be approved.
insurance.missingMsg: Insurance is required for profile approval. Please upload your policy.

form.expiryWarning_one: This policy expires in {{count}} day — consider uploading a renewed policy soon.
form.expiryWarning_other: This policy expires in {{count}} days — consider uploading a renewed policy soon.

errors.docSize: Document must be 5 MB or smaller.
errors.expiryFuture: Expiry date must be in the future.
errors.docRequired: Insurance document is required for initial setup.

business.title: Business Information
business.subtitle: Information collected for compliance purposes
business.missingMsg: Business information is required for onboarding. Please complete this section.

form.legalNamePlaceholder: Individual or business name as officially registered
form.ibanNote: Required for tax reporting under DAC7 — EU Directive 2021/514. Stored encrypted.
form.businessAddressHint: (optional — only if different from primary address)
form.businessAddressPlaceholder: Leave blank if same as primary address

errors.vatRequired: VAT number is required for companies.
errors.ibanInvalid: Please enter a valid IBAN (e.g. IE64IRCE92050112345678).
errors.websiteInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://example.com).

services.heading: Services
services.subheading: Manage the services you offer to parents.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of what this service includes…

empty.title: No services yet
empty.body: Add your first service to get started.

availability.heading: Availability
availability.subheading: Manage your weekly schedule, block out specific dates, and view booked sessions.

timezone.setPre: Your availability times are set in your profile timezone:
timezone.notSetBody: Please set your timezone in your
timezone.notSetSuf: before adding availability, so your slots display correctly to parents.

buffer.title: Buffer Between Sessions
buffer.description: Add an automatic break after each confirmed booking. For example, with a 15-minute buffer, if a session ends at 11:00 the next available slot will start at 11:15. This applies to all your services and is invisible to parents — they simply won't see the blocked window.
buffer.saveFailed: Failed to save buffer setting. Please try again.

advance.title: Advance Booking Limit
advance.description: Control how far ahead parents can book sessions with you. Slots beyond this window will not be visible or bookable. This helps you keep your schedule predictable.
advance.saveFailed: Failed to save advance booking limit. Please try again.

notice.title: Minimum Notice Period
notice.description: Set how much notice you need before a session. Slots within this window will be automatically hidden from parents — they simply won't see them as available.
notice.saveFailed: Failed to save notice period. Please try again.
notice.warning12hBody: The platform's cancellation policy does not issue refunds for bookings cancelled within 24 hours of the session. With a 12h notice period, parents can book sessions that fall inside this window — meaning a cancellation on either side may not be eligible for a refund. Consider setting at least 24h to stay outside this zone.

weekly.title: Weekly Schedule
weekly.conflicts_one: Removing this slot affects {{count}} confirmed booking:
weekly.conflicts_other: Removing this slot affects {{count}} confirmed bookings:
weekly.conflictNote: These bookings will not be cancelled automatically — you must manage them separately.

blockout.title: Block Out Dates
blockout.subtitle: One-off blocks — your recurring schedule is never changed.
blockout.noAvailWarning: You have no availability set for {{day}}s. This block will be rejected — add {{day}} availability to your Weekly Schedule first, or use a Full Day block instead.

errors.afterStartDate: Must be on or after the start date

info.noneCreatedSkipped_one: No new blocks were created — all {{count}} day in the range is already blocked or has no availability.
info.noneCreatedSkipped_other: No new blocks were created — all {{count}} days in the range are already blocked or have no availability.
info.skippedDays_one: {{count}} day skipped (already blocked or no availability)
info.skippedDays_other: {{count}} days skipped (already blocked or no availability)

calendar.heading: Calendar
calendar.subheading: Your availability and confirmed appointments in one view.
calendar.loadFailed: Could not load calendar. Please try again.

modal.title: Appointment Details
modal.reminderBody: Please send your Zoom or Teams meeting link directly to the parent before the session.

history.heading: Session History
history.subheading: All past sessions — completed, cancelled, and refunded.
history.loadFailed: Failed to load session history. Please try again.

empty.title: No session history yet.
empty.body: Completed and cancelled sessions will appear here.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.subheading: Manage your account security and notification preferences.

password.title: Change Password

errors.sameAsCurrent: New password must be different from your current password.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to change password. Please try again.

password.success: Password changed successfully. All other devices have been signed out.

notifications.title: Email Notifications

newBooking.label: New booking
newBooking.description: Receive an email when a parent books a session with you.

cancellation.label: Cancellation
cancellation.description: Receive an email when a parent cancels a booking.

messageReceived.label: Message received
messageReceived.description: Receive an email when a parent sends you a message.

notifications.toastError: Failed to save — please try again

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.descEnabled: A verification code is sent to your email each time you sign in.
twoFactor.descDisabled: When enabled, you'll need to enter a code sent to your email each time you sign in.

otp.instructionEnable: A 6-digit code was sent to your email. Enter it below to <bold>enable</bold> two-factor authentication.
otp.instructionDisable: A 6-digit code was sent to your email. Enter it below to <bold>disable</bold> two-factor authentication.

errors.sendFailed: Failed to send code. Try again.
errors.expired: Code expired. Please request a new one.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.retainedTitle: The following will be <bold>retained for 5 years</bold> under DAC7 (EU tax reporting obligations):

expertList.item2: Address, social links, and contact details

parentList.item1: Your name, email, and contact details
parentList.item3: All booking history and account data

retainedList.item1: Your full name and tax identification number
retainedList.item3: Earnings and booking records tied to financial transactions

deleteAccount.warningExpert: Deletion is blocked if you have a pending payout. Please wait for it to clear first.
deleteAccount.warningParent: Deletion is blocked if you have upcoming bookings, pending refunds, or open disputes. Please resolve these first.

confirm.irreversibleMsg: This action is <bold>permanent and irreversible.</bold> Your profile and login access will be deleted immediately.
confirm.passwordRequired: Please enter your password to confirm.
confirm.saveFailed: Could not delete account. Please try again.
